nodes.name: 📥 Receive WhatsApp Message
nodes.notes: URL to paste in session settings: https://n8ncourse.sidawin8n.cfd/webhook/whatsapp-incoming

nodes.name: ✅ Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge immediately so the server does not retry the request.

nodes.name: 🔍 Extract Message Fields
nodes.notes: Normalises the payload and maps wppconnect types to clean categories.

nodes.name: 🔀 Route by Message Type
nodes.notes: Routes to the correct handler: Text / Image / Video / Audio / Document. Unknown types go to the fallback (Other).

nodes.name: 💬 Handle Text
nodes.notes: Keyword-based auto-reply for text messages. Customise the conditions freely.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Handle Image
nodes.notes: Processes received images. You can save mediaUrl to a database or forward it.

nodes.name: 🎵 Handle Audio / Voice
nodes.notes: Handles both regular audio files and WhatsApp voice notes (ptt).

nodes.name: 📄 Handle Document
nodes.notes: Handles PDF, DOCX, XLSX, ZIP and other document types.

nodes.name: 🔗 Merge All Replies
nodes.notes: Single merge point before sending the reply. All 5 type handlers connect here.

nodes.name: 📤 Send Text Reply
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR-APP-DOMAIN with your server URL. Create an HTTP Header Auth credential with name=X-API-Key and value=your_api_key.

nodes.name: 🖼️ Send Image
nodes.notes: Use this node when you want to proactively send an image. Set sendImageUrl and sendCaption in an earlier Code node.

nodes.name: 📄 Send Document
nodes.notes: Use this node to send PDF, DOCX, or any document. Set sendFileUrl and sendFileName upstream.
